subcodes.title: Words to a reporter from the Bulletin, spoken on 1912-10-04
subcodes.first_line: God created man after His own image and likeness... but now, behaving contrarily, man has become more merciless
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند انسان را بصورت و مثال خود خلق کرده .... ولی حال بالعکس از حیوانات درنده بی رحم تر
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @human reality created in the image of God
